question.label: What's nourishing
question.name: What's been nourishing in your life recently?
question.description: 'Nourishing' invites what is genuinely sustaining — not just pleasant. No work scope.

assessment.note: [SHALLOW] 'Food' lacks specificity on what is nourishing — does not provide insight into wellbeing.

new_queue.label: Nourishing specifics
new_queue.name: When you say 'food' — what about it has been nourishing? Is it the act of cooking, the meals themselves, or something else?

new_queue.label: Energy read
new_queue.name: How's your energy been lately — separately from how work is going?

new_queue.label: Agenda check
new_queue.name: Before we get into it, anything you want to make sure we cover today?

new_queue.label: Late arrival observation
new_queue.name: I've noticed you've been arriving late — what's the situation there?

new_queue.label: Board engagement status
new_queue.name: How are you feeling about your current engagement with the board?
